rationale: Diff contains only execution evidence (manifest.json, result.json) — no GraphQL schema, resolver, model wiring, regenerated gqlgen code, or tests are present. Cannot evaluate any AC item against the actual implementation.

findings.summary: No backend changes visible in diff: missing schema additions for reportedWorkers/workerReports query, resolver against s.workerIngest, and gqlgen-regenerated code (AC1, AC2, AC5).
Required tests TestGraphQL_Workers_FreshnessFields and TestGraphQL_Workers_MultipleWorkersPerProject are not present in the diff (AC3, AC4).
Only execution evidence files were added; the underlying feature commit (83ec7853) is not included in the reviewable diff.
